description_long: This is a compact, single-story bungalow with a modern, minimalist design. The exterior walls are clad in gray brick, and the structure features several large rectangular windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The main entrance is a simple white door, and the roof is flat, giving the building a contemporary appearance. Inside, the layout includes a kitchen, dining area, living space, bathroom, and at least one bedroom, all visible through the windows and open plan. The interior is finished in light colors, with white walls and light wood flooring, and the furnishings are functional and modern. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, efficiency, and comfort, making it suitable for urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story gray brick bungalow with large windows, a flat roof, and a bright, open-plan interior. The design is minimalist and functional, ideal for urban living.
description_view_0: This view shows the main entrance door and a partial view of the living and dining area through the windows.
description_view_1: This side highlights a large window into the living area and a glimpse of the kitchen and entertainment space.
description_view_2: This angle reveals a bedroom window and the internal hallway, with the kitchen and dining area visible through the open plan.
description_view_3: This view displays two large windows, one into the bedroom and another into the living area, as well as the kitchen and dining space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large rectangular windows on multiple sides
